description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a fenced yard featuring a driveway, a carport, a swimming pool, and landscaped green areas. The building has a clean, rectangular layout with large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway and a small porch area, while the backyard includes outdoor seating, a round above-ground pool, and a blossoming tree. The exterior walls are primarily white, complemented by gray and beige accents, and the property is enclosed by a low, modern fence. The bungalow appears to have a single story with an open-plan interior layout, visible through the large windows and open spaces. The overall design emphasizes functionality, outdoor living, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, carport, and outdoor seating. The exterior is white with gray and beige accents, enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, driveway, and a clear view of the front porch and fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, carport, and a portion of the backyard with the pool and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, round above-ground pool, outdoor seating, and a blossoming tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, driveway, and a full perspective of the backyard amenities and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
